text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Tracen Meet, so I head<n>toward the
track to watch.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: You got this, Urara! Go for first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I won't give up until I win!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-Urara! Do your best, but don't hurt<n>yourself!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I let you train with me, so I won't<n>accept anything
but the best<n>performance today!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So you're trying out for the lead role<n>in this opera
too, huh? Then let us<n>both orchestrate a great
symphony<n>and blow them all away!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Orca straight? I'm not sure what that<n>means, but
I'll run as straight as I<n>can!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The starting signal sounds and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Here I goooo! Wha—whoa, whoa,<n>whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Oh goodness! Haru Urara seems to<n>have
overdone it and tumbled out of<n>the gate!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Owie... I scraped my knee... Oh no! I'm<n>being left
behind!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I can't give up! I've gotta<n>keep going!
Urarararaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara stands up and starts<n>running with all
her might. However...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner is T.M. Opera O! T.M.<n>Opera O is
first across the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... I... I made it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With thunderous applause from her<n>friends, Haru
Urara manages to finish<n>in last place.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: A-are you all right, Urara?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I'm fine! I just trippeda little in the beginning, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text:
But you really tried hard, Urara! Even<n>with your
fall, you managed to beat<n>your best time!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: REALLY?! I did it! Yippee!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well done! I can't believe how<n>courageously you
faced such a<n>challenge!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
This calls for a round of applause! A<n>big round of
applause for the one<n>who stands second only to
moi!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At T.M. Opera O's words, the whole<n>audience
claps for Haru Urara's<n>efforts.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I don't know what I did to<n>deserve this, but
thank you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a truly brilliant opera! One only<n>you could
have performed!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I am the sun, that makes you a<n>sunflower. Your
luminosity lies in your<n>simple elegance. That is
what draws<n>people in.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm? I have no idea what you mean,<n>but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ah! Sunflower seeds are superdelicious!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You dummy! That's not the point!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At the heart of this joyful scene<n>stands Haru
Urara, surrounded by<n>warm smiles and laughter.
